name: Catfish Orleans with Creole Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the catfish fillets.
2. Mix 1/4 cup liquid smoke, 1 cup melted butter or margarine, 1 teaspoon garlic powder, and 2 tablespoons salt in a bowl until well combined.
3. Pour in 1 1/3 cups soy sauce and stir to combine.
4. Serve the catfish over hot cooked rice.
